description_long: This is a vintage-style arcade game cabinet labeled 'SPACE BALL', featuring a weathered, light blue-green metal exterior with visible signs of rust and wear. The front panel includes a rectangular display screen with a green game interface, a joystick, and four red buttons arranged in a diamond pattern, all set above a vented lower section. Two thick, black power cables extend from the base, coiling loosely on the ground, and the rear panel displays a yellow caution sign, suggesting electrical components inside. The side panels are adorned with bold white stripes and the 'SPACE BALL' logo, giving it a retro-futuristic aesthetic. The cabinet stands on a wide, flat metal base for stability, and the control panel is slightly angled for ergonomic gameplay. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements aside from the side graphics and game branding.
description: A weathered, retro 'SPACE BALL' arcade game cabinet with a green screen, joystick, red buttons, and bold white side graphics. Thick cables extend from its base, and the metal exterior shows signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the 'SPACE BALL' logo and white stripes, with cables emerging from the base and a red control lever visible near the front.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain metal back with a yellow caution sign and two thick cables extending outward.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with the 'SPACE BALL' logo and white stripes, and cables coiled at the base.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the green display screen, joystick, four red buttons, 'SPACE BALL' branding, and vented lower panel, with cables on the ground.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat rectangular, medium size with visible bezel and green display
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick on the left and four red buttons arranged in a diamond pattern on the right; control panel is angled and metallic
attribute_side_panel_graphics: White geometric stripes and 'SPACE BALL' text on a weathered blue-green background
